description: ADPA Template CoE lifecycle bridge — phase guidance, QC gates, and ADPA ritual stage mapping.

adpaStages.name: Ideation
adpaStages.description: Draft template concept and advisory JSON

adpaStages.name: Business Case
adpaStages.description: Value assessment and cost of inaction documented

adpaStages.name: Execution
adpaStages.description: Template approved for generation and IaC translation

adpaStages.name: CSR Baseline
adpaStages.description: Certified stable release with checksum evidence

initiation.label: Initiation
initiation.summary: Register a new template or bring an existing ADPA template into governed lifecycle.
guidance: Define template purpose, audience, and pillar mapping.
Link to framework source document or governance requirement.
Assign a domain owner before advancing to onboarding.

onboarding.label: Onboarding
onboarding.summary: Complete business justification, schema validation, training, and CoE checklist.
guidance: Submit business justification with value proposition and risk assessment.
Run schema validation gate — all required keys must pass.
Complete template author training modules.
Obtain CoE governance council approval via checklist.

active.label: Active
active.summary: Template is approved for production use in governance generation and artifact translation.
guidance: Template may be used for LLM-driven artifact generation and document output.
Monitor telemetry triggers and drift against certified baseline.
Use Build & Update phase for material changes — never edit certified templates without version bump.

build_update.label: Build & Update
build_update.summary: Apply versioned changes to template content, re-run QC gates, and return to active.
guidance: Document change summary and link to AMD record if material.
Re-run schema validation and DRACO review (blocking mode).
Run AEV attestation before returning to Active.
Increment template version in manifest and file metadata.

retiring.label: Retiring
retiring.summary: Deprecate template with migration plan and stakeholder communication.
guidance: Publish deprecation notice and sunset date.
Define migration path to replacement template.
Notify all template consumers and tenant owners.
Complete deprecation plan gate before final retirement.

retired.label: Retired
retired.summary: Template removed from active use. Audit trail and versions preserved immutably.
guidance: Template must not be used for new generations.
Historical artifacts and documents remain valid for audit.
Reactivation requires new initiation through CoE council.

qcGates.name: Schema Validation
qcGates.description: Validate template file structure, manifest registration, and required keys.

qcGates.name: Framework Alignment
qcGates.description: Verify frameworkSource path exists and pillar/category mapping is consistent.

qcGates.name: DRACO Quality Review
qcGates.description: AI review board — advisory during onboarding, blocking during build & update.

qcGates.name: Human Approval
qcGates.description: Governor sign-off required before template enters active production use.

qcGates.name: AEV Attestation
qcGates.description: Atomic Execution & Validation attestation for material template changes.

qcGates.name: Deprecation Plan
qcGates.description: Migration plan and stakeholder communication verified before retirement.

qcGates.name: Owner Assigned
qcGates.description: At least one domain owner must be assigned.
